title: Google Expands Personal Intelligence
summary: Google is expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, Gemini app, and Gemini in Chrome. This move aims to bring personalized AI experiences to more users.
body:
Google has announced the expansion of Personal Intelligence, a feature designed to provide users with more personalized and relevant information. This expansion will see Personal Intelligence integrated into AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app, and Gemini in Chrome, allowing more users to benefit from its capabilities.

 The expansion of Personal Intelligence is significant as it underscores Google's commitment to leveraging AI to enhance user experience. By incorporating Personal Intelligence into its search and browser functionalities, Google is poised to revolutionize how users interact with information online. This move could potentially set a new standard for personalized search and browsing experiences.

 As Google continues to push the boundaries of AI integration, the expansion of Personal Intelligence is likely to garner significant attention. Users can expect a more tailored experience when using Google's services, with the AI-driven feature aiming to understand and adapt to individual preferences and needs. The reaction from the public and the tech community will be closely watched, as this development opens up new possibilities for AI in everyday applications.
twitterThread: 🚀 Google just announced a major expansion of Personal Intelligence! 🤯 This AI-powered feature is coming to AI Mode in Search, Gemini app, and Gemini in Chrome. Get ready for a more personalized online experience!
Here's why this matters: Personal Intelligence can learn your preferences and adapt to your needs. Imagine having a search engine that truly understands you. The potential is huge!
The wild part? This expansion is just the beginning. Google is committed to pushing the boundaries of AI integration. What does this mean for the future of search and browsing?
Let that sink in: with Personal Intelligence, Google is setting a new standard for personalized experiences online. This changes everything for users and developers alike.

This is a game-changer for the tech industry. Google's move will likely inspire other companies to invest in AI-driven personalization. The future of online interactions just got a whole lot more interesting.
standaloneTweet: Google's Personal Intelligence is expanding to AI Mode in Search, Gemini app, and Gemini in Chrome! This AI-powered feature will revolutionize your online experience. Read more: https://ainformed.dev/articles/google-expands-personal-intelligence
